title: Hive Query Language (HQL) Processing Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the sequence of steps from writing an HQL query to retrieving results, highlighting Hive's translation of SQL-like syntax into MapReduce/Tez/Spark jobs.
relationships: User submits an HQL query to the Hive Driver
Driver passes the query to the Compiler which fetches metadata from the Metastore
Compiler creates an execution plan optimized for the chosen execution engine
Execution engine (e.g., MapReduce) executes the plan as a job on the Hadoop cluster
The cluster processes the job and returns the final result to the user
